{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-798", "name": "Use of Hard-coded Credentials"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-c8m8-3jcr-6rj5. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
FUXA v1.2.7 contains a hard-coded credential vulnerability in server/api/jwt-helper.js. The application uses a hard-coded secret key to sign and verify JWT Tokens. This allows remote attackers to forge valid admin tokens and bypass authentication to gain full administrative access.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2r8f-cf6w-x5vq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-02-04T19:22:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r8f-cf6w-x5vq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2r8f-cf6w-x5vq"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-02-03T18:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-02-03T18:30:47Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-69971", "https://github.com/frangoteam/FUXA/blob/master/server/api/jwt-helper.js", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r8f-cf6w-x5vq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/frangoteam/FUXA", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: FUXA contains a hard-coded credential vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T16:21:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2r8f-cf6w-x5vq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "fuxa-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.2.7"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-11T16:21:54Z"}
